page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for compute-intensive workloads. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores using the x86_64 architecture, powered by an Intel Xeon 8469C processor running at a base clock speed of 2.6 GHz. The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This instance includes two integrated GPUs with a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. It does not feature any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps, managed via the KVM hypervisor.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile represents a high-density resource allocation, balancing dedicated physical CPU cores with a substantial VRAM footprint. This configuration is optimized for workloads that require parallel processing capabilities without local disk dependencies, such as deep learning model training, large-scale GPU-accelerated simulations, high-performance computing, and complex data science tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-2x.8xlarge is a dedicated GPU-accelerated server instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 32 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8469C processor operating at 2.6 GHz, alongside 192.0 GB of system memory. The hardware configuration features two GPUs providing a total of 192 GB of VRAM, delivering high parallel processing capacity. This instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps under the KVM hypervisor. The dedicated core allocation and high VRAM density make this instance qualitatively cost-effective for resource-heavy parallel computing tasks. It is highly suited for workloads such as deep learning, GPU-accelerated data science, and high-performance computing simulations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and two GPUs offering 192 GB VRAM, optimized for parallel computing workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-2x.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and two GPUs with 192 GB VRAM for high-performance GPU workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-GPU compute instance featuring thirty-two physical Intel Xeon cores and one hundred ninety-two gigabytes of system memory.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8469C CPU cores at 2.6 GHz
192.0 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB per core
Two integrated GPUs with a total of 192 GB VRAM
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage
Suited for deep learning, scientific simulations, and parallel computing
